examples.title: Falling Distance
examples.content: Distance = ½gt². At 1 sec = 5m, at 2 sec = 20m, at 3 sec = 45m. Not linear (curves faster).

examples.title: Population Growth
examples.content: Bacteria double every hour: 1, 2, 4, 8, 16, 32... Exponential growth, not linear.

examples.title: Gravity's Inverse Square
examples.content: Force = GMm/r². Double distance, force becomes ¼. Inverse square relationship.
